name: reconstruction_pamap2_hd_comparison_seed42_v1
purpose: Run the three-method metric contract on the official UCI PAMAP2 Protocol input; never a paper-reproduction claim.

protocol.subject_selection: seeded_random over the nine valid subjects, limited to eight

metric_contract.fedhdc: global_test_accuracy: sample-weighted single global prototype accuracy

limitations: One seed and reconstructed public preprocessing make this a screening only.
